scripts.build:chrome: BROWSER=chrome tsc -b && BROWSER=chrome vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/manifest.json'));delete m.background.scripts;delete m.browser_specific_settings;fs.writeFileSync('dist/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2))"
scripts.build:firefox: BROWSER=firefox tsc -b && BROWSER=firefox vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('dist/manifest.json'));m.permissions=m.permissions.filter(p=>p!=='offscreen');delete m.background.service_worker;fs.writeFileSync('dist/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2))"
